chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1535 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6690/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.6554/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.6655/2025 (Ex.A) 5. For hearing of main case 08-10-2025 Mr. Parmanand, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioners have challenged their transfer and posting order dated 02-08-2023 issued by Respondent No.1. Admittedly, the Petitioners are civil servants, whereas, transfer posting is one of the terms and conditions of service, therefore, the jurisdiction of this Court is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, hence the instant Petition cannot be entertained under writ jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant Petition fails and it is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
